titleStmt.title: SII 7.255: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 255. (A.R. No. 78 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO THE EAST WALL OF THE TIRTHANKARA-BASTI WITHIN THE SANTISVARA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya
śāśanaṁThe anusvara is engraved below the line.jinaśāśanaṁ . svasti śrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāhanasakavaruṣa 1544 neya du¨rmmatisaṁvatsa
rada kā¨rttikaśuddha 1 sthiravāradallu geyda kā¨ryya mattappuduṁ yēnūra śāṁtīśvaraśvāmiya cai
tyālayadalli lalitakī¨rttibhaṭṭārakadēvara priyāgraśiṣyaraha madurakadēviyarāda Aṁmmā
jiyaru puṁjaḷikeya rājyaṁgeyva kāladalli beḷḷariya saṁkara Arasara kumāra kabeyara baḷiya
rāmanātha Arasaru hadinārumaṁdi seṭṭigāraru mūnūra AruvattaĀrumaṁdi yeḷamegoḷagā
da samastahalara muṁdiṭṭu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi māḍida dha¨rmmada vivaraveṁteṁdare .
sāṁtīśvarasvāmige paṁcāmrutadha Abhiṣēka va¨rdhdhamānasvāmiya ni¨rvvāṇakalyāṇada pūje ka
¨rmmani¨rjariya nōhi paṁcaparamēṣṭigaḷa Amrutapaḍi Alliya baladabhāgada tī¨rtthakaraba
stiyalli jīvadayāṣṭamiya nōhi tiṁgaḷige voṁdu sukravāradivasa tapōdhanarugaḷige
Āhāradāna . yiṁtī dha¨rmmagaḷige madurakadēviyarāda Aṁmājiyara hastadalli Ā rāmanā
thaArasaru koṭṭa varaha gadyāṇa 100 Akṣaradallu nūru varahana koṭṭu dhārādattavāgi māḍikoṁ
ḍu neredēvasvavāda kṣētrada vivara . yiṁnūrāḷavaṭṭada māranadukaṭṭada bayalallu Ari Arihi
māreṁba gadde 1 mēgaṇamakaḷiyeṁba gadde 1 mēgaṇa poṁgā¨rttimāreṁba gadde 1 muṁḍitimāreṁba
gadde 1 Aṁtu bayala gadde 4 kke bittuva bīja 30 ttara lkeda mūḍe 20 yidakkuḷḷa teṁkaṇa beṭṭugaḷu
gadde 3 kke bīja mūḍe 4 Ubhayaṁ gadde 7 kke bīja mūḍe 24 kke gēṇi Akki muḍe 50 ttara lekkada
mūḍe 35 kke dha¨rmmavyaya va¨rddhamānasvāmiya ni¨rvvāṇapūjegu śāṁtīśvarana
Abhiṣēkaku Akki muḍe 8 ka¨rmmani¨rjjariya nōhiga Akki mu 9 paṁcaparamēṣṭigaḷa Amruta(pa)
paḍige Akki mūḍe 3 tī¨rtthakarabasti naḍava jīvadayāṣṭaminōhige Akki mūḍe 5 śukravā
ra tiṁgaḷige voṁdu tapōdhanarugaḷige Āhāradānakke Akki mūḍe 10 Aṁtu Akki mūḍe 35 . yiṁtī da[¨rmma]
vanu Arasaprati yivaru dēsadavara Ubhayānumatadiṁda māḍidha dha¨rmakke maṁgala mahā śrī
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
